---
name: Feature request
about: Plan a new gameplay, teaching, or collaboration feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the user-facing or teaching goal.

## Target User

Who benefits from this feature?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe what should happen in the scene or system.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The expected behavior is visible in Unity Play Mode
- [ ] The flow is understandable for the target child/user
- [ ] The change does not break existing scene interactions

## Testing Notes

Describe how this should be tested, including VR device checks if needed.
